ip_outcome_note: Card name is Tapu Lele; depicted figure matches the canonical Psychic/Fairy-type guardian deity of Akala Island — pink and white butterfly-shell form with distinctive shell encasing lower body. Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io API (name, flavor text, oracle text), Pokemon.com TCG database, and Bulbapedia description of the four Alola guardian deities.

trivia_bullets.text: Tapu Lele is one of four Alolan guardian deities introduced in Pokemon Sun and Moon, each protecting one of Alola's main islands: Tapu Koko guards Melemele, Tapu Lele guards Akala, Tapu Bulu guards Ula'ula, and Tapu Fini guards Poni Island. Each deity also triggers a terrain effect via its Ability — Tapu Lele's Psychic Surge sets Psychic Terrain, boosting Psychic-type moves. [Bulbapedia: Guardian deities, WebSearch snippet]

Flavor text (LOT-150): 'As it flutters about, it scatters its strangely glowing scales. Touching them is said to restore good health on the spot.' — Tapu Lele's scales are described as healing in lore but dangerously chaotic if scattered recklessly; the deity is characterized as capricious and indifferent to the suffering it may cause. [PokemonTCG.io API]

This card is illustrated by Mizue and printed as a Holo Rare in Lost Thunder (SM8, November 2018). The holographic treatment is thematically appropriate — the scatter-and-sparkle foiling reinforces the scale-scattering mechanic described in the flavor text. [PokemonTCG.io API]

The card's Ability, Charmed Charm, inflicts Confusion on the opponent's Active Pokemon whenever a 'Fairy Charm' Tool card is attached — a defensive synergy mechanic specific to the Fairy Charm tool cycle released in the Sun and Moon era. Its attack, Magical Shot, costs FairyColorlessColorless for 70 damage. [PokemonTCG.io API]

related_cards.name: Tapu Koko GX
related_cards.note: Guardian deity of Melemele Island; shares the four-Tapu deity cycle

related_cards.name: Tapu Bulu GX
related_cards.note: Guardian deity of Ula'ula Island; same cycle

related_cards.name: Tapu Fini GX
related_cards.note: Guardian deity of Poni Island; completes the four-deity cycle

related_cards.name: Tapu Lele GX
related_cards.note: GX version of the same character; iconic for its Wonder Tag Ability which became a meta-defining card in competitive play
